name: mod_identity_small
reason: Modulo of a value smaller than the divisor equals itself — tests the core ensures clause directly

name: mod_zero_is_zero
reason: 0 mod anything positive is 0 — tests the lower boundary

name: mod_len_minus_one
reason: `(len-1) % len == len-1` — tests the upper boundary just below the divisor

name: mod_one_is_identity
reason: With `len == 1`, only `i == 0` satisfies the precondition — tests the degenerate divisor case

name: mod_identity_implies_less
reason: The modulo result is strictly less than the divisor — a weaker consequence that follows from the identity, but could mask that this only holds under `i < len`
